title: Colony PCR
steps: Dissolve one colony in 20 µL of nuclease-free water and heat at 80°C for 10 minutes.

Prepare the following 50 uL reaction in a 0.2mL PCR tube on ice: Component uL Reaction 1 Magnesium chloride (MgCl2) 25 mM 4 µL 2 5X Colorless GoTaq Buffer 5 µL 3 PCR Nucleotide Mix 10 mM 0.5 µL 4 Forward primer 10 uM 1 µL 5 Reverse primer 10 uM 1 µL 6 GoTaq DNA polymerase (5u/uL) 0.2 µL 7 DNA Colony 10 µL 8 Nuclease-free water 3.3 µL 9 TOTAL 25 µL
Gently mix the reaction and spin down in the microcentrifuge

Cycling conditions for a routine PCR: A B C D 1 1 Cycle Initial activation 2 minutes 94ºC 2 35 Cycles Denaturation 30 seconds 94ºC 3 Alignment 30 seconds 50ºC 4 Extension 2 minutes 72ºC 5 1 Cycle 72ºC 6 Maintenance ∞ 4ºC
creator: Georgina Elisa Diego Macías
